mnemonics.title: Interface Rules
mnemonics.content: IMPRESS: Implicitly public, Multiple inheritance, Public static final variables, Reference type, Everyone implements, Static methods allowed, Single contract

mnemonics.title: Interface vs Abstract Class
mnemonics.content: MACS: Methods Abstract (+ default/static), Abstract Classes have constructors, Single inheritance, variables Any type

mnemonics.title: Interface Key Points
mnemonics.content: IDEAS: Implicitly public abstract methods, Default and static methods allowed, Everyone implements, Abstract classes differ, Single contract defined
